hero.description: Luxury fragrances crafted for the discerning individual. Each bottle tells a story, each scent creates memories that last forever.

featured.title: Signature Fragrances
featured.description: Discover our most beloved scents, each carefully crafted to evoke emotion and create lasting memories that define your unique essence.

about.title: The Art of Shama
about.description1: Born from a passion for olfactory artistry, Shama represents the perfect harmony between traditional craftsmanship and modern innovation. Each fragrance is a carefully composed symphony of the world's finest ingredients.
about.description2: Our master perfumers spend years perfecting each blend, ensuring that every bottle carries not just a scent, but an emotion, a memory, a piece of your story.

marketingVideo.title: Experience Shama
marketingVideo.description: Watch how Shama creates luxury fragrances that define your signature scent

social.title: Follow @ShamaFragrance

samples.title: Perfume Samples
samples.description: Explore our luxurious fragrances in travel-sized samples before committing to a full bottle.

step1.title: Pick your size
step1.body: Choose a 3ml or 5ml sample of any fragrance in our collection — no commitment required.

step2.title: Wear it for a week
step2.body: Scent lives differently on skin than on paper. Try it with your wardrobe, your mood, your moments.

step3.title: Come back certain
step3.body: If it's the one, come back for the full bottle — now you know exactly how it moves with you.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.lede: Answers to the questions we hear most. Can't find what you're looking for? Send us a DM on Instagram.

ordering.heading: Ordering
ordering.q1: Do I need an account to order?
ordering.a1: No — guest checkout is supported. An account helps you track orders and save a wishlist, but it's optional.
ordering.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
ordering.a2: Cash on Delivery or bank transfer to our Libyan bank account. For bank transfers we ask for a screenshot of your transfer before dispatching your order.
ordering.q3: Can I cancel or change my order?
ordering.a3: Yes, before the order is shipped. DM us on Instagram with your order code and we'll help straight away.

shipping.heading: Shipping
shipping.a1: Libya only, via our partner Vanex. Every city and sub-city Vanex serves is available at checkout.
shipping.a2: Most orders arrive within 2 to 5 business days after dispatch. Your exact estimate is shown at checkout based on your address.
shipping.a3: Delivery cost depends on your sub-city and is calculated by Vanex in real time during checkout. No hidden fees.
shipping.q4: How do I track my order?
shipping.a4: Use the Track Order page with your order code, or sign in and open My Orders for live Vanex tracking.

products.heading: Products
products.q1: How do I know which perfume suits me?
products.a1: Try the Fragrance Quiz for a guided match, describe what you want to the AI Finder, or pick a 3ml sample first on the Samples page.
products.a2: Yes — most perfumes are available in 3ml and 5ml samples so you can try before committing to a full bottle.
products.a3: Yes. We curate niche and designer fragrances from trusted sources — every bottle is authentic.

support.heading: Support
support.q1: How do I return a product?
support.a1: See the Returns page. Sealed, unopened bottles can be returned within 7 days; you coordinate the Vanex pickup and cover the return delivery fee.
support.a2: Instagram DM is the fastest way. You can also reach us on Facebook or TikTok. See the Contact page for all channels.

about.title: A whiff of scent, a lasting memory
about.lede: Shama (شمَّة) means a whiff of scent in Arabic — a fleeting note of perfume on the air that stops you mid-step. That's the brand.

name.heading: The name
name.body: شمَّة isn't a candle and it isn't a cloud. It's the moment a scent catches you — passing in a doorway, sitting beside someone, walking through a souk. We wanted a name that captured that tiny, luminous moment.

atelier.heading: The atelier
atelier.body: We curate niche and designer fragrances with intention. Every perfume in the collection earns its place — through composition, story, or the way it lingers on skin. Curation over quantity, always.

promise.heading: The promise
promise.body: Authentic perfumes. Transparent prices in Libyan Dinar. Honest delivery times through Vanex. And a real person on the other end of every Instagram DM — because luxury without hospitality is just packaging.

about.pullquote: Each bottle tells a story. Each scent creates a memory.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.lede: We live on DMs. The fastest way to reach us is Instagram — expect a reply within 24 hours.

tiktok.label: TikTok
tiktok.description: Short clips of arrivals and moments.

bank.heading: Bank transfer
bank.sub: For pre-paid orders. Transfer the product price; pay delivery on arrival.

contact.response: We reply within 24 hours — usually much sooner.

reviewsPage.title: What our customers say
reviewsPage.lede: Every review here is from a verified customer, published after our team reviews it. Real words, real bottles.
reviewsPage.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first.

cookieBanner.body: We use a few small storage items so your cart, language, theme and preferences stay with you. We do not use analytics or tracking cookies.

shipping.title: Delivered across Libya
shipping.lede: We partner with Vanex — Libya's trusted courier — to carry each bottle from our atelier to your door with care.

coverage.heading: Coverage
coverage.body: We currently ship within Libya only. Every city and sub-city served by Vanex is available at checkout.

times.heading: Delivery times
times.body: Most orders arrive within 2 to 5 business days after dispatch. Your exact estimate is shown at checkout based on your address, and confirmed once Vanex picks up the package.

fees.heading: Delivery fees
fees.body: Shipping cost depends on your sub-city and is calculated by Vanex in real time during checkout — no hidden fees, no surprise charges on delivery.

payment.heading: Payment methods
payment.intro: You can pay in one of two ways:
payment.cod: Cash on Delivery — pay the full amount (products + delivery) to the courier when your order arrives.
payment.bank: Bank Transfer — transfer the product price to our account in advance, then pay only the delivery fee on arrival.

tracking.heading: Tracking your order
tracking.body: Each order moves through a transparent 6-stage flow: Pending, Confirmed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Accepted. Track any order at any time using your order code on the Track Order page.

support.heading: Something off with your delivery?
support.body: Message us on Instagram and we'll look into it right away. If the bottle arrived damaged or doesn't match your order, we'll make it right.

returns.title: Simple, fair, and on your terms
returns.lede: We want you to love your Shama. If a sealed bottle isn't right for you, here's how to return it — no forms, no friction.

window.heading: 7-day window
window.body: You have 7 days from the day your order is delivered to initiate a return.

condition.heading: Sealed and unopened only
condition.body: For hygiene and authenticity, returns are accepted only on bottles that are still sealed, unopened, and in their original packaging. Once a bottle is sprayed, it cannot be returned.

mechanism.heading: How it works
mechanism.body: Message us on Instagram with your order code. We'll coordinate the Vanex pickup — you hand the sealed perfume to the courier, and you cover the return delivery fee. Once the bottle arrives and is verified, we refund the product price in full.

nonReturnable.heading: What cannot be returned
nonReturnable.item3: Gift sets once the outer seal is broken

start.heading: Start a return
start.body: Send us a DM on Instagram with your order code and we'll take it from there.

returns.callout: If your bottle arrived damaged or wasn't what you ordered, we replace it free of charge — just share a photo with us within 48 hours of delivery.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.lede: We keep things simple. This page explains what we collect, why we need it, and how we protect it.

collect.heading: What we collect
collect.intro: We only collect what we need to process your order and keep your account working:
collect.item1: Name, email, phone, and delivery address — to fulfil your order.
collect.item2: Order history and preferences — if you create an account.
collect.item3: Email address — if you subscribe to our newsletter.
collect.item4: Reviews you choose to publish — tied to your account.

store.heading: How we store it
store.body: Your data lives in our Supabase database, encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. Access is restricted to the small team that runs Shama.

never.heading: What we never collect
never.intro: Some things we don't touch — because we don't need them:
never.item1: Credit card numbers — we only support Cash on Delivery and bank transfer.

thirdParties.heading: Third parties we rely on
thirdParties.intro: To run Shama we use a handful of trusted services:
thirdParties.item1: Vanex — to deliver your order. Shares your name, phone, and address.
thirdParties.item2: Supabase — to host our database and handle sign-ins.
thirdParties.item3: OpenRouter — to power the AI chatbot, Finder, and Quiz. Your prompts are processed to produce a response.
thirdParties.item4: We do not use analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: You can ask us to access, correct, or delete your data at any time — just DM us on Instagram. We'll respond within 7 days.

children.heading: Age limit
children.body: Shama is intended for customers aged 16 and older. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 16.

updates.heading: Changes to this policy
updates.body: If we update this policy we'll change the date at the top and flag significant changes on the homepage.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.lede: The short version: be honest with us, respect the brand, and we'll take care of you.

acceptance.heading: Using this site
acceptance.body: By browsing shama.ly or placing an order you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the site.

products.heading: Product descriptions
products.body: Fragrance is subjective. We describe notes, families, and impressions as accurately as we can, but scent is personal — how a perfume performs on you may differ from our notes or photography.

pricing.heading: Pricing
pricing.body: Prices are in Libyan Dinar (LYD). We may change prices at any time; the price you pay is the one shown at checkout. Obvious pricing mistakes may be corrected and the order cancelled.

orders.heading: Order acceptance
orders.body: We may decline or cancel an order for suspected fraud, stock issues, or pricing errors. If we cancel an order you've already paid for, we refund the full amount.

payment.heading: Payment
payment.body: We accept Cash on Delivery or bank transfer. For bank transfers we ask for a screenshot of your transfer before dispatching your order.

ip.heading: Intellectual property
ip.body: The Shama name, logo, images, and content are ours. Please don't copy, resell, or re-brand them without permission.

liability.heading: Limitation of liability
liability.body: We take reasonable care, but we're not liable for indirect losses caused by delivery delays, third-party courier issues, or allergic reactions — please patch-test any new fragrance.

law.heading: Governing law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Libya. Any dispute will be resolved in the Libyan courts.

cookies.title: Cookies & storage
cookies.lede: A plain-English look at every storage item shama.ly sets — so you know exactly what's kept on your device.

rows.cart: Your shopping cart — remembers items between sessions.
rows.recentlyViewed: Perfumes you've recently viewed — for the carousel on the home page.
rows.auth: Your Supabase sign-in session (if you have an account).
rows.adminAuth: Admin panel session — only set if you sign in to the admin area.
rows.adminSidebar: Whether the admin sidebar is collapsed.
rows.announcement: Whether you've dismissed the top announcement bar (session only).
rows.consent: Your response to this cookie notice.

noAnalytics.heading: What we don't set
noAnalytics.body: No Google Analytics, no Meta Pixel, no advertising cookies, no cross-site trackers. We don't sell your data and we don't share it with third-party marketers.

managing.heading: Managing storage
managing.body: You can clear any of these keys at any time from your browser's developer tools or privacy settings. Clearing them may sign you out or reset your preferences.
